gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the diff with no findings and spot-checked the native_probe_factories module help and stdout CLI behavior.
scope: Native probe factory diagnostics CLI, document-branded script metadata, compatibility exports, README guidance, and focused tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_native_probe_factories.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests; poetry run pytest -q; GPT-5.5 spot-checked python -m document_kv_cache.native_probe_factories --help and stdout output
what_changed: Added the document-kv-native-probe-factories CLI for emitting built-in vLLM/SGLang native probe factory diagnostics to stdout or JSON.
why: Operators need an installed-package command to capture reserved native probe factory status and pinned serving-environment profiles while preparing real vLLM/SGLang block-manager adapters.
